title: Tev Rimon
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Tev}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Tev_Rimon.jpg]] |name=Tev Rimon |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Legacy (2006) 14|''Legacy'' (2006) 14]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him{{CSWECite|III|101|Rimon, Tev "Crasher"}} |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin=Brown |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] *[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] **[[1st Imperial Center Core Defense Squadron]] *[[Empire-in-exile]][[Legacy — War 4|''Legacy — War'' 4]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Spast, Cannon—that scav ''had'' to be an ace pilot to dust all ''four'' of us!|Tev Rimon to Brodie Coburn, after Cade Skywalker outflew Skull Squadron|}} '''Tev Rimon''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the service of [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|New Empire]] during the [[Second Imperial Civil War]]. He flew a [[Predator-class fighter|''Predator''-class fighter]], under the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] of "'''Crasher'''" in [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gunn Yage]]'s [[1st Imperial Center Core Defense Squadron|Skull Squadron]], a [[Squadron/Legends|unit]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|What we have are ''orders'', Skulls. Don't have to ''like'' 'em. Just obey 'em.''"
"''I'm good. Let the Sith take care of their own. What do I care?|Gunn Yage and Tev Rimon|[[Legacy (2006) 19|''Legacy'' (2006) 19]]}} Tev Rimon, also known by the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] "Crasher," was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Fel Empire|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Roan Fel]]. He was commanded by [[Gunn Yage]] as part of [[1st Imperial Center Core Defense Squadron|Skull Squadron]] during the [[Second Imperial Civil War]]. In [[137 ABY]], the [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] flew as part of the [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Sith Empire]] ruled by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] [[Darth Krayt]]. [[File:ImperialPilots.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Tev Rimon with his fellow Skulls]] Rimon and the other pilots were stationed on the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] when [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Cade Skywalker]] attempted to rescue the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Hosk Trey'lis]] from the [[Temple of the Sith]]. Given orders to capture Skywalker alive, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] Rimon and the Skulls engaged the former Jedi's [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the [[Mynock (Helot-class)|''Mynock'']], in the skies of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] until Skywalker managed to lose his pursuers in the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|undercity]]. Rimon returned to [[Skull Squadron Hangar]] with his squadmates. Rimon flew against the ''Mynock'' once again when a group of Skywalker's allies, including the former Jedi's mother, [[Morrigan Corde]], piloted the ship as they attempted to rescue Skywalker from the Sith Temple where he was being held captive. Just as the Skulls started to wear down the ''Mynock'', they were given orders to abort the mission by Captain Yage's father, [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Rulf Yage]], to avoid violating the Sith's airspace. Rimon later participated, along with the rest of the squadron, in the [[Operation: Thunderstroke]].[[Legacy (2006) 44|''Legacy'' (2006) 44]] A year later, [[138 ABY]], Rimon fought in the [[Attack on the Hidden Temple]],[[Legacy — War 3|''Legacy — War'' 3]] where Skull Squadron was given orders to shoot down a Jedi shuttle. Captain Yage refused to shoot defenseless children and shot [[Darth Rauder]] instead. Rimon complied with Yage's commands and joined the Empire-in-Exile to fight against the Sith on Coruscant.[[Legacy — War 5|''Legacy — War'' 5]] {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Legacy (2006) 14|''Legacy'' (2006) 14]] {{1st}} *[[Legacy (2006) 19|''Legacy'' (2006) 19]] *[[Legacy (2006) 45|''Legacy'' (2006) 45]] *[[Legacy (2006) 46|''Legacy'' (2006) 46]] *[[Legacy (2006) 48|''Legacy'' (2006) 48]] *[[Legacy — War 3|''Legacy — War'' 3]] *[[Legacy — War 4|''Legacy — War'' 4]] *[[Legacy — War 5|''Legacy — War'' 5]] ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 0|''Star Wars: Legacy'' (2006) 0]] {{1stm}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Tev Rimon |pl=Tev Rimon }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Rimon, Tev}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Navy pilots of Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
